title: Middle-Earth_and_Farmer's_Delight
description: Middle-Earth and Farmer's Delight is a Datapack to bring compatibility in craft and item between Middle-Earth and Farmer's Delight
body:
This Datapack Bring compatibility between Middle Earth and Farmers Delight. All the item of Farmers Delight can now be found and craft from Middle Earth (exeption of Nether Item). The crate can now be made with middle earth equivalent. The stove/skillet/pot can be made using tin to make it more accessible in early game. Rice can now be found in small pond in Rhun.(see in Gallery.) # -= Craft Added =-
## Cooking
- egg to Boilet egg
## Cutting
- me:Straw to fd:straw
- mud to Clay ball
- me:quartz block to me:quartz shard
- me:red agate block to me:red agate shard
- me:glowstone block to minecraft:glowstone
## Crafting
- Cabbage crate
- onion crate
- tomato crate
- cooking pot
- skillet
- Stove
- horse feed
- organic compost
